testcase.name: test_scrape_products_valid_url
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_services.py:80: in test_scrape_products_valid_url assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 400: {"detail":"Kon pagina niet laden: [SSL: CERTIFICATE_VERIFY_FAILED] certificate verify failed: unable to get local issuer certificate (_ssl.c:1016)"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_scrape_products_url_without_protocol
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_services.py:109: in test_scrape_products_url_without_protocol assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 400 E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
